creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2006-12-08 22:27:19 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    x11-toolkits         Makefile 
  Added files:
    x11-toolkits/qwt-devel Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  The Qwt library contains GUI Components and utility classes which
  are primarily useful for programs with a technical background.
  Beside a 2D plot widget it provides scales, sliders, dials, compasses,
  thermometers, wheels and knobs to control or display values, arrays,
  or ranges of type double.
  
  WWW:    http://qwt.sourceforge.net/
  
  PR:             ports/106487
  Submitted by:   Max Brazhnikov <makc at issp.ac.ru>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.436     +1 -0      ports/x11-toolkits/Makefile
  1.1       +47 -0     ports/x11-toolkits/qwt-devel/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/x11-toolkits/qwt-devel/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +7 -0      ports/x11-toolkits/qwt-devel/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +902 -0    ports/x11-toolkits/qwt-devel/pkg-plist (new)
